creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Forwarding Pedro's input to GNATS for the record. Thank you Pedro!

giffunip@tutopia.com, 30.04.13, 17:09h CEST:

>  Hello Makoto-san;
> 
>  Sorry for the delay in replying.
> 
>  I wasn't aware of this issue. I think it might be related to
>  an old bug in gcc on 8.2-Release. I suggest testing on a
>  newer release or an updated compiler (should work on clang).
> 
>  Hope that helps;
> 
>  Pedro.
